title: Easy Baryonyx Coloring Page
seoTitle: Easy Baryonyx Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Color a simple cartoon Baryonyx dinosaur. Perfect for kids who love prehistoric life. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The name of Baryonyx means 'heavy claw', referencing the massive thumb spikes it used to spear prey in swampy waters.
Baryonyx was a fish-eating theropod dinosaur that lived during the Early Cretaceous period in what is now Europe.
